title: Ranold's Boss Music (Datapack)
description: This is a work in progress resourcepack/datapack that adds boss music to bosses in minecraft!
body:
# <big>OUTDATED, USE [THIS](https://modrinth.com/mod/ranolds-boss-music) ONE!</big>



![RanoldsBossMusic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ac8a404640e83552ffbd50e64bfb88857c923b0.png)

So this is the Datapack verions of **Ranold's Boss Music**, which adds boss music to bosses using advancements and such. 

For this to work at all, you will need [Ranold's Boss Music (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ranolds-boss-music/version/1.0)

Supported mobs:
- Wither, Music from Minecraft Dungeons "[The Four Horsemen](https://youtu.be/OsOWi_3RFu4?si=wnBTDQNB2ulYwV0f)" by Peter Hont
- That's all folks. (More will be added in the future, maybe even mod support!!!)
